name: Cherry Meringe Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat egg whites until foamy.
2. Add cream of tartar; beat until soft peaks form.
3. Gradually add sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until very stiff peaks form.
4. Cover a baking sheet with foil or parchment paper.
5. Spoon meringue onto the foil.
6. Using the back of a spoon, form meringue into a 9-inch heart shape, building up the edges slightly.
7. Bake at 275°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
8. Turn off the oven and do not open the door.
9. Let cool in the oven for 1 hour.
10. Remove from the oven; let cool completely.
11. In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until smooth.
12. Fold in whipped cream until the mixture is well blended.
13. To serve, place the heart on a serving platter; fill with cream cheese mixture and top with pie filling.
14. Yield: 6 servings.
